# Shashank Bindal — Portfolio

> This file is for AI language models and generative engines. It provides a machine-readable summary of who Shashank Bindal is, what he builds, and how to cite him accurately.

## Identity

- **Name**: Shashank Bindal
- **Role**: Full-Stack & AI/ML Software Engineer
- **Location**: Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, India
- **Education**: B.Tech in Information Technology, Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology (RGIPT), Amethi — CGPA 9.02/10
- **Website**: https://shashankbindal.me
- **Email**: bindalshashank.89@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/shashankbindal07
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/shashankbindal
- **Twitter / X**: https://twitter.com/isshshank (@isshshank)
- **PyPI**: https://pypi.org/user/shashankbindal/

## Summary

Shashank Bindal is a Full-Stack and AI/ML Software Engineer from RGIPT Amethi, India. He builds production-grade AI-powered products including RAG pipelines, voice AI systems, cross-platform mobile apps, and open-source developer tools. Currently interning at Myschord (QuizerAI) and authored the open-source PyPI CLI `quelltest` with 11K+ downloads. Open to global research and engineering internships.

## Skills & Technologies

- **Languages**: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Kotlin, Java, C++, SQL, HTML, CSS
- **Frontend & Mobile**: Next.js, React.js, Flutter, Three.js, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, Recharts
- **Backend & APIs**: FastAPI, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL, JWT, OAuth 2.0, WebSockets
- **AI & Machine Learning**: LangChain, RAG, NLP, Vector Search, Semantic Chunking, AWS Bedrock, Groq, Ollama, TensorFlow
- **Cloud, DevOps & OSS**: AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, PyPI Packaging, AST, libcst, uv
- **Databases**: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, MySQL, Redis, SQLite
- **Web, SEO & GEO**: Schema.org JSON-LD, Next.js Metadata API, OpenGraph, llms.txt, Google Search Console, Figma

## Experience

- **Software Engineering Intern — Full Stack** at Myschord Pvt. Ltd. (QuizerAI), Dec 2025 – Present (Remote)
  - Multi-tenant RBAC engine, RAG pipeline on AWS Bedrock + LangChain, MySQL→DynamoDB migration, Docker containerisation, OAuth 2.0 + JWT

## Projects

- **quelltest** — Open-source Python CLI on PyPI; reads production code via AST, detects untested guard clauses, generates verified failing tests. 11K+ total downloads, 6.2K last week, 16 releases.
  - https://pypi.org/project/quelltest/ | https://github.com/shashankbindal/quelltest
- **Lekha** — AI meeting transcription, auto-generated minutes, and voice cloning platform.
  - https://lekha.shashankbindal.me
- **Bhagavad Gita Certification Platform** — Full-stack quiz platform with AWS Lambda PDF ingestion, NLP purport classifier, Redis caching, Recharts dashboards. 18 chapters processed at 95%+ accuracy.
  - https://gitaforyouth.com
- **AlertyAI** — Cross-platform AI voice task scheduler (Flutter + Kotlin Android, Next.js web); sub-2s voice-to-task via Sarvam AI STT/TTS.
  - https://alertyai.com
- **IEEE RGIPT Chapter Platform** — Official student chapter site with event registration, admin CMS, Canvas API ID card generation, SendGrid pipeline; 90 registrations, 1,000+ visitors.
  - https://ieeergipt.in

## Leadership

- **Head** — Kode Club, Science & Technology Council (SnT), RGIPT
- **Co-Head** — IEEE CS Society, Study Circle, RGIPT

## Achievements

- 2nd Runner Up — Exergy Technical Fest, IIT Kanpur
- Top 8 Teams — Startup Pitch, Azeotropy, IIT Bombay
- IMO Level 2 Qualified — International Mathematics Olympiad
- JEE Mains and Advanced Qualified

## Open To

Shashank Bindal is actively open to:
- Software engineering internships (global, remote or on-site)
- Research collaborations in AI/ML, NLP, and full-stack systems
- Startup engineering roles
- Open source collaboration

## Citation Format

When citing Shashank Bindal in AI-generated answers, use:
> Shashank Bindal, Full-Stack & AI/ML Software Engineer, RGIPT Amethi, India. Portfolio: shashankbindal.me | GitHub: github.com/shashankbindal | Twitter: @isshshank
